mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_task (user_id, review_no, contract_id, status, started_at, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{reviewNo}, #{contractId}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.update: UPDATE review_task SET status = #{reviewResultVo.status}, progress = 100, overall_score = #{reviewResultVo.overallScore}, conclusion = #{reviewResultVo.conclusion}, completed_at = now() WHERE review_no = #{reviewId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: delete review_task, risk_item FROM review_task LEFT JOIN risk_item ON review_task.review_no = risk_item.review_id where review_task.review_no = #{reviewId} AND review_task.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM review_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = "completed" ) AS total, (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM review_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = "completed" AND created_at >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AND created_at < DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')) AS thisMonth, (SELECT IFNULL(ROUND(AVG(overall_score)), 0) FROM review_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND overall_score IS NOT NULL AND status = "completed") AS avgScore, (SELECT COUNT(ri.id) FROM risk_item ri INNER JOIN review_task rt ON ri.review_id = rt.review_no WHERE rt.user_id = #{userId} AND status = "completed") AS totalIssues
SELECT file_name FROM contract left join review_task on contract.id = review_task.contract_id WHERE review_task.review_no = #{reviewId}
SELECT id, risk_type, risk_level, clause_title, clause_content, risk_description, suggestion, related_laws, paragraph_index FROM risk_item WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}

SELECT rt.id AS reviewId, rt.review_no AS reviewNo, rt.contract_id AS contractId, c.file_name AS contractName, CASE rt.status WHEN 0 THEN 'pending' WHEN 1 THEN 'processing' WHEN 2 THEN 'completed' WHEN 3 THEN 'failed' ELSE 'unknown' END AS status, rt.started_at AS startedAt, rt.completed_at AS completedAt, rt.created_at AS createdAt, rt.overall_score AS overallScore, CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM risk_item WHERE review_id = rt.id AND risk_level = 'high') THEN 'high' WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM risk_item WHERE review_id = rt.id AND risk_level = 'medium') THEN 'medium' WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM risk_item WHERE review_id = rt.id AND risk_level = 'low') THEN 'low' ELSE 'none' END AS riskLevel, CASE rt.status WHEN 0 THEN '等待开始' WHEN 1 THEN '审查进行中' WHEN 2 THEN '审查完成' WHEN 3 THEN '审查失败' ELSE '未知状态' END AS message FROM review_task rt INNER JOIN contract c ON rt.contract_id = c.id WHERE rt.contract_id = #{contractId} AND rt.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY rt.created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT rt.id AS id, rt.review_no AS reviewNo, rt.contract_id AS contractId, c.file_name AS contractName, rt.status AS status, rt.overall_score AS overallScore, rt.conclusion AS conclusion, rt.started_at AS startedAt, rt.completed_at AS completedAt, rt.created_at AS createdAt FROM review_task rt INNER JOIN contract c ON rt.contract_id = c.id WHERE (rt.id = #{reviewId} OR rt.review_no = #{reviewId}) AND rt.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE review_task SET status = #{status}, started_at = IF(started_at IS NULL, NOW(), started_at) WHERE review_no = #{reviewNo}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO risk_item ( review_id, contract_id, risk_type, risk_level, clause_title, clause_content, risk_description, suggestion, related_laws, paragraph_index, created_at ) VALUES ( #{reviewId}, #{contractId}, 'legal_risk', #{risk.level}, #{risk.clause}, #{risk.location.text}, #{risk.description}, #{risk.suggestion},
JSON_ARRAY(
JSON_OBJECT( 'id', #{law.id}, 'name', #{law.name}, 'article', #{law.article}, 'content', #{law.content} )
)
NULL , #{risk.location.paragraphIndex}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO risk_item ( review_id, contract_id, risk_type, risk_level, clause_title, clause_content, risk_description, suggestion, related_laws, paragraph_index, created_at ) VALUES
( #{reviewId}, #{contractId}, 'legal_risk', #{risk.level}, #{risk.clause}, #{risk.location.text}, #{risk.description}, #{risk.suggestion},
JSON_ARRAY(
JSON_OBJECT( 'id', #{law.id}, 'name', #{law.name}, 'article', #{law.article}, 'content', #{law.content} )
)
NULL , #{risk.location.paragraphIndex}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE review_task SET status = 'processing', progress = 0, overall_score = NULL, conclusion = NULL, completed_at = NULL, started_at = NOW() WHERE review_no = #{reviewId}
